ai_role: Silicon wafer supplier for semiconductor manufacturing
tvs_tiebreaker: Treat as an upstream cyclical bottleneck; require attractive valuation and cycle timing.
technical_timing_rule: Technical and semiconductor-cycle timing should gate adds.
rationale: SUMCO participates in the silicon wafer layer needed for semiconductor scaling, but wafer markets can be cyclical and pricing power is less durable than Tier 1 equipment or foundry chokepoints.
